name: iris_portfolio_breach_scan
description: Portfolio-wide scan — returns ALL limit records in breach across the entire book on a given date. min_overage is REQUIRED to prevent full-book dumps. No counterparty_code needed — scans all counterparties.

min_overage.description: REQUIRED minimum overage amount in native currency. E.g. 1000000 for $1M threshold. Must be provided — no default.

internal_rating.description: Return only counterparties with rating <= this value
